solutions: T5 is a seq2seq model (not causal LM), so AutoModelForCausalLM cannot load it. Solution: pre-load model using T5ForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained() and pass model object directly to AutoRound() instead of model ID string.

AutoRound calibration for T5 seq2seq models requires decoder_input_ids, which is complex. Solution: use iters=0 with disable_opt_rtn=True to force blockwise RTN quantization, bypassing calibration entirely.

T5 has tied weights (encoder.embed_tokens, decoder.embed_tokens, shared.weight all share memory). safetensors refuses to save shared tensors directly. Solution: use ar.quantize() then ar.save_quantized() to a temp dir then copy files, avoiding the internal safetensors shared-tensor check.
